basic_details.job_title: Collector Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts

qualification.education_qualification: For more information on educational qualification, salary, service conditions, application form and more, please visit the link given along with the online application form.
qualification.details: For detailed information on educational qualifications, please refer to the official notification. The minimum qualification mentioned is graduate.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Collector Office Bastar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Collector Office Bastar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Collector Office Bastar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Collector Office Bastar recruitment is 21 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the अतिथि शिक्षक post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 60 vacancies available for the अतिथि शिक्षक post in the Collector Office Bastar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the provided online application link.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for the अतिथि शिक्षक positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the अतिथि शिक्षक positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification mentioned in the summary is graduate. For specific post-wise qualifications, please refer to the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the अतिथि शिक्षक positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the अतिथि शिक्षक positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the Collector Office Bastar recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Collector Office Bastar, located in Jagdalpur, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 30 June 2026.
